title: Behavioral Grounding Framework (BGF): LLM-Grounded Multi-Agent Economic Simulation
description: BGF is an open-source multi-agent economic simulation framework that grounds LLM agent behavior in empirical sociodemographic data from the European Social Survey (ESS). It demonstrates and quantifies the RLHF cooperative bias in instruction-tuned LLMs, introduces the Behavioral Realism Metric (BRM) and RLHF Bias Index (B_RLHF), and provides a reproducible pipeline for LLM-driven computational social science research.
notes: Includes 1,200+ unit and integration tests across 91 test files. Requires Python 3.10+. GPU optional (Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3); CPU-only mode available via MockPolicy and dry-run scripts.
